Document:
# Other Roles
This section covers special ghost roles that do not fall under antagonists, free agents, or standard crew jobs. These roles are typically crew-aligned or neutral, arriving to assist the station or simply existing within it.
- [textlink="Station Pets" link="Pets"] — friendly mascots that live aboard the station. - [textlink="Emergency Response Team" link="ERT"] — Centcomm-dispatched emergency personnel sent to assist a station in crisis.
